notes: Axum HTTP server starts, serves routes. No auth, no graceful shutdown, no startup reconciliation.
Namespace-scoped delivery, actor stores, mailboxes. KERNEL vs RESERVED namespace mismatch, kernel_security 0 tests.
Append-only SQLite store works. Dual-write bypass paths, 4x duplicated row_to_envelope, target_actor_id dropped in platform.db, no corruption recovery.
Namespace and reserved-namespace validators work. 3/5 ValidationError variants dead code, no payload schema checks, elevated flag unchecked.
Projection trait and EventBus exist with rebuild. Non-transactional dual-write, non-idempotent config_generation, direct SQL bypasses in workspace_state.rs and session_drain.rs.
Create, stop, suspend, restore. No health monitoring, no restart policies, kernel_security untested.
Register, send, broadcast, discover work. No heartbeats, no backpressure, stale entries on crash, actor_id forgery via mesh_register.
REST endpoints function. Zero HTTP-level tests, no auth, hardcoded CallerKind.
Studio reads and SSE delivery work. No auth, no workspace isolation verification.
Starts workspaces and terminals. Fire-and-forget — no process monitoring, no restart, no graceful shutdown, in-memory pending jobs lost on restart.
WebSocket-to-tmux works with max 5 per workspace. Zero tests on connection layer.
Telegram outbound notifications work. Inbound unused. Single provider only.
Serves files, git status, agents, skills. Stale worktree_path bug being fixed (RT-06).
Subscribes to job.created, spawns agents. 0 tests, dual dispatch paths, in-memory state lost on restart.
SQLite via sqlx works. No connection pooling, no integrity checks, KV namespace isolation by convention only.
Create, activate, list, get, delete. Works, tested via other modules.
Status transitions work. lifecycle.rs 234 lines, 0 tests.
Git worktree creation works. Stale path detection being fixed.
Set agent, compile provider configs. Compiler handles output generation.
Query provider matrix. Read-only, straightforward.
Start/end works. session_lifecycle.rs 254 lines, 0 tests.
Immutable records created on session end. Simple, works.
148 lines, 0 tests, bypasses event system entirely. Data durability boundary.
Emits events and applies projections. Non-transactional, 0 tests, non-idempotent config_generation.
Per-workspace model, cost, MCP, skill, and provider overrides.
Push/pull works. No conflict handling.
Reconcile logic written and committed on job/reactive-workspaces branch. Not merged, not wired to all entry points yet.
Bearer token auth for daemon HTTP endpoints. Any local process can currently call any endpoint.
All mutations through events, transactional projections, no direct SQL to projection tables.
ship rebuild-projections command and daemon endpoint to replay events and reconstruct read models.
SIGTERM handling: notify agents, end sessions, clean mesh, timeout, exit.
Supervisor tracks launched processes, detects crashes, restart with backoff.
Formalized agent connect/heartbeat/disconnect with health states.
Per-caller rate limits on event emission to prevent flooding.
Daemon serves ship-sdk.js, views registry, .ship/views/ convention. Extension model for Studio.
.ship/hooks/ executables triggered by platform events. Extension model for automation.
ship init installs git hook that notifies shipd on branch checkout.
